mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_push_tokens (user_id, fcm_token, platform, updated_at) VALUES ( #{userId, jdbcType=OTHER, typeHandler=com.kidspoint.api.config.UUIDTypeHandler}, #{fcmToken}, #{platform}, #{updatedAt} ) ON CONFLICT (user_id) DO UPDATE SET fcm_token = EXCLUDED.fcm_token, platform = EXCLUDED.platform, updated_at = EXCLUDED.updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT upt.fcm_token FROM user_push_tokens upt WHERE EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM family_members fm WHERE fm.user_id = upt.user_id AND fm.role = 'child' ) AND length(trim(upt.fcm_token)) > 0
